title: Worked 2 days piece junk
text: Received a replacement today hooked it up on the charger for about an hour or two went to use it and the entire side speaker area where you use for the charging port that whole side doesn't work you hear nothing only the opposite side this company is a piece of crap

title: Not what I was hoping for.
text: Easy to connect to Bluetooth. Sound quality is okay. I am returning to seller because of the fit. The ear piece flexes way out and it looks silly on. I think the quality of the earphones is crappy. Also had to contact amazon customer service because when I went to get a return label they were going to charge me 7dollars for shipping it back. amazon covered that for me, thankfully.

title: 10/10 Recommend if you wear glasses
text:
Very happy with these.

Pros:
- Sound quality is decent. No complaints from someone that listens to a lot of pop/edm
- Good at cancelling out noise (awesome office headphones)
- Comfy with glasses. Had to return my last pair of wireless headphones because they'd press against my glasses and cause pain. These don't do that, they're cushioned enough to be comfy for hours.
- The battery life is great - hours of charge (great for flights/work)
- Lovely rose gold/white color
- The fact that they fold down. It's prob not good for the headphones but you can fold them onto the strap of a carry-on bag while going through TSA.
- They come in a nice little hard carrying case, too.

Cons:
- As much as I love them, I do think they're more of a $20 item you'd prob get at TJMaxx or Ross, not close to $30 (but they've def been work $27 imo)
- White padding gets dirty easily
- Charging cable it comes with is super short (expect to us

title: My daughter loves these HD headphones!
text: My daughter loves these!  Comes with the case, charger, about 19” usb cord, Aux cord, instructions, warranty info., and a thank you card.  Wrapped securely and just perfect. Even a little clip on the case to clip on a gym bag or whatever.  I can’t stop rubbing the case!  Extremely durable and soft.  The sound is superb, maybe just me, however I tried these out and these sound like I am in a room with surround sound!  No joke!  Came with a slight charge to test and so glad I didn’t have to charge first then try these out before giving to my girl.  Can’t beat the price for the value of this product!  I actually just ordered myself one for the gym!  Thank you so much and this was a lightening deal and so glad that it was or I wouldn’t have been actually looking for headphones!  Can’t wait for mine!

title: Garbage audio and battery.
text: Bought these for the gym. The audio quality is terrible. Luckily I listen to mostly podcasts at the gym, for that the audio is great. For actual music listening these are garbage. Worked great for a month but after that will no longer hold a charge. Spend an extra $20 and get some better ones.

title: Very good headset for the money!
text: [[VIDEOID:6e528fbc75070223b16932e017da7010]] This headset is very comfortable and has great sound for the price. The Bluetooth was extremely easy to set up and use, no drops or interference at all. My only struggles have been the battery life and volume control on the aide of the war piece. I tend to bump the function button instead of volume control but as I said in my video that may be just my own struggle. 😊 The battery life really could be better, it lasts a full eight hour work day IF you are not on calls/in meetings all day. It seems to do best with about six hours of use. I recharge every night and have lost use a couple times in late afternoon meetings. Overall, absolutely worth the money and I would purchase again.

title: Excellent
text: I’ve gone through a few pairs of earbuds and finally decided to go for over the ear headphones. I am so pleased with these! They’re comfortable, they stay connected and the sound is GREAT! Amazing bass! They were comfy at the gym and laying in ed watching tv on my iPad! For $25 I’d highly recommend these for an inexpensive, quality sound headphone option. The only thing I’d say is that they are not completely noise cancellingn but they’re good enough for my use.

title: more about features than audio quality
text: These headphones have a surprising number of features, but the audio quality is not what I would consider acceptable.  The real issue is that the sound is missing mid to high end clarity, which is why my rating was 2 stars.  I purchased these mainly for the bluetooth functionality, and they connected to my computer with no issue.  It was also impressive being able to tune in FM radio stations with just a few clicks, and the reception was adequate, but not without some static.  There is also an SD card slot that I've not tested yet.  I appreciate the ambition in the feature set, but I would prefer a better sounding set of bluetooth headphones regardless of any additional features like an SD Card slot and FM radio.

title: Happy with these headphones!
text:
I got these for work - I like to listen to music while I work, and I was tired of running over the cord of my headphones, getting it tangled in my chair. A couple of times, I knocked over my iPad.

Excellent sound quality. Excellent noise reduction. Work at a fairly good distance from device. I walked out of my office suite, down the hall - still had clear music . When I got to the ladies room, it started curring in and out. That's a pretty good distance from my desk, so these give me good mobility around the office while still enjoying music.

title: You get what you pay for...sometimes
text:
I've had at least 6 pair of these Power Locus headphones now and some have been great, most have had issues. Three pair broke shortly after I got them but the others are holding up well. Some have had excellent sound quality and others have an annoying echo, especially with the on/off voice pre-programmed in. Still, for the money, these seem to be the best deal.

Oh yeah, sometimes some pairs have had a hard time maintaining connection and will play static mixed with the sound. I thought it might be my computer but they do it with my phone and TV as well. It doesn't happen all of the time, though. That makes me think they're getting interference from another device in, or near, the house.

title: Grandson was very happy...
text: My grandson asked for these so he could watch movies on his iPad. Works great for me too, I don't have to listen to his gaming😁

title: surprisingly amazing headphones
text: has great sound! i was so surprised, i was cleaning and had the sound hardly half way and couldnt hear when i was talked to. the design is so simple and cute too. definitely would recommend to buy, compared to higher end headphones these definitely are amazing.

title: Great sound & comfortable fit
text: I purchased 2, one for my husband & one for myself. They arrived quickly & as described. They were very easy to sync with devices. At this time the sound & comfort are awesome. The built in FM radio has auto search with crisp clear reception. If they hold up, their well worth the purchase!

title: 9 Y.O. Son loves these
text: Easy to Pair with Bluetooth device.  Battery life is decent and my son likes the feel.  Great for a kid, but quality is of course not comparable to a high end product line.  But good for the price.

title: Does what it needs to do
text: Love these headphones! Got them to use at my office to help block out distractions. Look great, work great, no complaints. The parts are plastic though so it doesn't feel as luxe as it looks.

title: Twins Like Them Better Than Other Models
text:
Update: The twins have used these daily for six weeks with no problems. The charge then every couple of days.

This is the third set of headphones I've bought for the 11 year twins and their favorite. They like the bluetooth connection with their MP#3 players, they fit more securely, the controls are easier to manipulate, and the sound quality is significantly better. They have speakers if they want to share their music but use the headphones when they want to dance to their own beat. There was no setup required for the headphones. The MP3 player found them and connected as soon as they turned on. Took them one day to run the battery completely out.

title: Junk
text: It charged fine for about a week then quit charging. Been charging for 2 day still nothing.  Come on plays for about 39 minutes.

title: ON THE EAR...Not over the ear.
text: The sound quality is pretty good for this price point. Unfortunately... these are on the ear... not over the ear... so I had to give them to my grandson. Quality seemed decent the short time I used them.

title: Great battery life, decent sound, inexpensive but sturdier than it looks
text: I waa worried that the folding joints would break, but they loosened up nicely and fold smoothly now. The sound is ok, it's not Bose, but it's decent for my use. They're definitely comfortable, although the ear cups are just a smidge too small for me. But they're so soft, it isn't a problem except they don't cancel sound since they don't cover my ears quite as they should. These headphones have really, really great battery life and with a fast charger... they charge super fast! Love that! My area doesn't have good radio reception, so there's static, but I haven't tried them elsewhere. My one little complaint is that I can't leave the SDcard inside because then it won't play anything else. I'd like to leave it in but still use the headphones by  Bluetooth with my phone. Fortunately, there's a pocket inside the included case (nice case!) so I put the SDcard in a little case into there. Overall, I'm really pleased with this purchase.

title: Poor quality
text: These were a gift for Christmas sent to me. Poor quality. There’s a lot of background static. I would not recommend buying these. I tried to contact the company via the QR code warranty info. But it says the page isn’t available.

title: Can't get better for the price!
text: I bought these headphones for my daughter since this year has moved to distance learning in school. She is 8 years old and the headphones fit her great! She loves them and they are super easy to use and the sound quality is great for what she needs them for. Much more comfortable than the earbuds they were given at daycare.

title: Well worth the money
text: I dislike the max volume on the headphones and they aren’t the BEST at noise cancellation but they sound amazing. They are well worth the price, with the volume up (not all the way but close) I cannot hear the vacuum as I’m doing the vacuuming. They fit my head well and don’t hurt my ears. I bought a pair of Beats before these and honestly would never pay that much again, they weren’t worth it. These are my new go to headphones. The Bluetooth works well and the battery life is amazing, it also comes with cables to connect directly to whatever it is your listening to. It has the place for iPhones are well.

title: Meh
text: I wanted to like them but I can't. The battery dies very quickly. They are uncomfortable and hurt my ears. They are bulky. The only good part is the camo.. otherwise I'm very disappointed in this purchase.

title: Sound quality not that impressive
text:
It might be described as mid range sound quality. The low frequency is obviously missing and high frequency is also not impressive. The overall package is a good deal but cannot accept the sound quality while comparing to other similar products I have.

Another note is that the this kind of head phone to prone to breakage of the head band.

title: Awesome headphones for the price!
text: Great quality especially for the price, ordered the teal and white and the colors are beautiful. Great sound quality, though the ear pieces are a smidge on the small side but I have smaller ears so it doesn't bother me at all. Love that it comes with a great case too. Battery life is excellent!

title: Exactly what we were looking for
text: I purchased this to replace wired headphones that are worn all day at work. We wanted an inexpensive set because they might be damaged at the worksite. These far out performed my expectations for the price!

title: Good gift for grandchildren
text:
I searched for headphones he wanted and found I didn't know anything and they were extremely expensive.
Great grandson came by when I was searching to order, he said grammy get these. You don't have to spend a fortune. Whew. He is happy with them

title: had to return
text: Bought as a gift but received with box completely torn up.  You could tell someone had returned it and hadn't been careful opening it first. I couldn't give as a gift the way it was.

title: Great at first but then the constant beeping started
text:
Pros: Bluetooth has great range, headphones are cushy and block out most external noise, the geometric pattern and color is nice, and they came with a sturdy case. The battery life is pretty good. I have to charge every 2 days but I do use them A LOT.

Cons: If you wear glasses you might find that they pinch the frames to your head but it's a very minor discomfort.

My main issue: About 3 months after buying, I noticed that when I turn them on, whether they are paired with a device or not, they emit this beeping into my ears. It's constant and it's loud enough to hear even with netflix or music coming through the headphones. I have to admit, this kind of ruins them for me. I don't want to hear "beep beep beep" any time I wear my headphones. I want to hear my music. I got these in a lightening deal but if I had paid full price for them I would be pretty bummed.

title: The worst
text:
It took me a while to switch over to using the Bluetooth. I used the cord initially because that’s what I was used to. I switched over because the audio would glitch out… like something in the cord when I would move (i.e. RUN) would make the audio all static-y. So I was like mkay guess I’ll try the Bluetooth. Not long into this, something on one side of the headphone came lose - sound still worked but when I would run - VERY apparent something was loose. K I guess I can’t wear them while I run. Fast forward to now. The Bluetooth has stopped working entirely, so
I’m back to the cord. Can only walk or lift weights with them… nothing bouncy. They are THE WORST. I guess it’s time for me to invest in something quality and more expensive. Don’t waste your money on these.

title: Stopped working
text: Lasted about 3 months then stopped connecting,  reset then would connect and disconnect. Amazon couldn't help and manufacturer was too hard to get ahold of

title: Good sound
text: All I'll say is they block out screaming kids.

title: Pretty Headset
text: I just started using it today. I like them so far. The sound is decent. But I didn't need state of the art headset. Just something that will allow me to listen to my podcasts and audiobooks without disturbing my husband sleeping and buying it in rose pink was just a plus.

title: Not bad, paired with my Mac immediately.
text:
I'm really liking these phones.
They paired immediately with my 2014 Mac mini (running 10.12.6).

They are a bit heavy on the bottom end, they're somewhat bassy, so I end up using iTunes EQ to roll off the bottom end a bit, in fact I created a "HEADPHONES" preset when using them in iTunes.
They do "skip" a bit, losing the BT connection (I'm assuming), but they re-pair immediately.
This can be a bit annoying, but may be exclusive to being paired to a PC, also the range to my Mac doesn't seem great...in fact just walking across the room I get "skips" in the connection (I'm assuming).
Again I'm not a super tech and any connection issues I have may be due to other wireless/wired signal interference that may be happening. Although I try to keep wireless connections to a minimum.
I'm listening to them now and have been for a couple hours and they are comfortable after 2 hours, 0I've been listening to a wide range of music genre and for the cash these are gr

title: Average at Best
text:
I love the looks of the headphones and they sound great. So called noise cancellation is pretty non-existent, but I haven't found one yet that works. I have a bigger head, so the headphones are a little tight on me and they have a weird smell that I'm hoping goes away.

Very easy to know when they are turned on, which I like. I'll keep them, but wouldn't buy them again unless they have bigger pairs.

title: Headphones
text: When I first got this I thought it sounded great, it even kept a good charge. But then I started having problems with it. the sound didn't sound great, or after listening for awhile, I would lose sound. If I plugged the headphones into a outlet that had a reset button on it and reset it, all of a sudden things like the sound would come back. Strange but that's what would happen. I contacted the company and they were friendly and helpful to try to get this resolved. And they seemed determined to get the product Workin like it should be.

title: Good headphones
text: I got these because my dog eat my other headphones. they're good quality they sang good they don't hurt my ears when I wear them for longer periods of time

title: Practical
text: My husband likes over the ear headphones because he can’t stand the in the ear type. These are easy to set up to his iPhone. The sound quality is acceptable. The price is good. However, they break if dropped on hard surfaces. I just bought him a second pair and if he breaks them, I’ll buy this product again because of the price. A good value.

title: Great sound and comfort
text: I loved these head phones, very good sound quality and very ease of use.

title: Great customer service
text: First pair I bought fell apart as soon as I received it. The company was nice enough to send me another pair and they work really well.

title: Didn't even last one year!
text: I bought in spring of 2019 - About two months (fall 2019) ago I realized that they wouldn't always charge when I plugged them in. Last week I realized that the earpiece near the charging hole was coming apart. Tried to charge a few days ago and the whole mechanism that inside of the earphones to grasp the charger when inserted came lose and is now rattling around inside the headphones. There's absolutely no way to charge now.

title: Great product
text: Great service and  love the product

title: Broke quickly
text: Not super comfortable either. I have small ears and they pinched them when in use.

title: GOod for price
text: These headphones are pretty great. I always used earbuds but wanted to try these for my laptop. They connect easily when I turn them on. The sound quality is great. They can totally bump. Sometimes, there seems to be like a .1 second delay where the people's mouths seem to be off from their words. It's not super noticeable, but annoying for a person who would notice something like that. They're comfortable and fit nicely, though I don't think they would work for a child. I wear them for hours at a time and they don't bother my ears at all. The color is really pretty, too. FOr the price, I'm happy with my purchase.

title: So good I purchased a second pair
text: I bought a pair for my daughter for school, they’re so nice I bought a pair for myself for when I work out. Great purchase

title: Very impressed
text:
So I have only used these once or twice now so as I use them more if I change my mind I'll update this review.

They are absolutely noise canceling and almost work too well, if a plane landed in my yard I might not hear it.

I don't like the controls on it but I'm using this for the purpose of teleworking only so I'm just going to control things from my laptop anyways. But I'm the type who can't figure out tiny buttons without looking at them so the ear controls won't be something I bother using.

I can't hear as perfect as I would like. The sound is definitely a bit low and I have to turn my computer volume up higher. I think I'll get used to it or figure it out better I just need more time with it.

No one has a problem hearing me through the microphone, they say it sounds fine. I also have a coworker who has these same ones and I can hear them fine.

The carrying case is very nice

They are VERY comfortable

I de

title: Poor sound quality.
text: Bluetooth connected fine but the sound quality was just...bad. cheap headphones that sound like cheaper headphones.

title: Comfortable, Good for the price
text: These are light and comfortable for me with a small female head. Sound quality is fine if not top quality. My only problem is that I got them to pair with my Echo. Paired the first time. Next time they wouldn't talk to each other, so I unpaired and tried to re-pair them. Alexa says she can't find them. (Alexa can be dumb sometimes.) So sometimes I connect them to my computer with a cable, but I wish I could figure out the pairing problem.

title: Great customer service
text: Issues with the cord but company was very responsive.  Overall great product.

title: Great Headphones
text: Great quality and the features are nice, easy to use.

title: No inbuilt mic seems!
text: Sound quality was decent. But looks like there is no inbuilt mic in the headphone. While product description claims it is. Don't know if I got the defective product or what? I specifically bought it for communicating. But the mic stopped working after a day of use. So appears it was the defective piece? Anyways, I had to return it with no choice.

title: Long battery life, good sound quality
text: I liked that if I wear it backwards meaning left side on my right and right side on my left, I can wear them with my behind the ears heating aids.  Great sound quality. Long lasting battery. Very comfortable and very adjustable.

title: Broke after about a year
text: [[VIDEOID:414cc1543c4575d6a5ddb0c292a33179]] They were ok while they lasted. Should have gotten the warranty. They snapped after almost a year. I admit I wear them alot I'm undecided if I'll buy another pair but the sound is pretty good nice. Bass. Clean and clear. They can be nice and send me a free pair 😆

title: Nice
text: I can listen to my music on my iPhone, or iPad by plugging in or using Bluetooth.

title: Good sound and battery life
text: I wear glasses and have to take them off or it squeezes them against my head. It has good sound quality and good battery life.

title: Good deal
text: Nice headphones only issue not as noise cancelling as I would like.

title: Mic and speaker together with Bluetooth do not work well
text:
When I attach with my laptop by Bluetooth it keeps going on and off in listening
Mic and speaker together do not work well

title: Best bluetooth headset for the price
text: For the price, you cant beat this headset. Works great, long distance and holds an excellent charge. The case it came with is very nice as well.

title: Sound great
text:
Bought these for my fiancee , who has turned into a work out fanatic! Head phones sound great but are a little on the large side for a female .

The head phones also have some great features, and overall build is good .

title: I wear them to the gym or on a walk and I love them.
text: I wear them to the gym or on a walk and I love them.

title: Great product
text: Bought these for my daughter and she is in love with them. High quality and awesome sound for a good price. I would highly recommend them. It also comes with a carrying case with a clip u can attach to anything.

title: Great for School
text: We got these for our son for Back To School since our county has a 1:1 device program. He loves them and the case allows for them to easily be attached to his device bag making sure that he always knows where they are. I would recommend.

title: Works as intended
text: You shouldn't expect the quality of high end noise cancelling headphones, but these are a good deal for the price.

title: A little small!
text: I really liked the headphones and am sorry I have to return them!  I really liked all the features but I needed something to wear in loud environments and thought this would work great.  If it came in various sizes I would consider this a medium sized headphones and I would need a large!  My ears would not comfortably fit inside these headphones.  They would work great for kids, but should really have larger headphones that go over the ear.  I did not get much of a chance to test them in a loud area because it did not cover my ears completely and could not seal the pad tightly against the sides of my head.

title: Awful
text: I regret buying this. The sound quality is terrible and the mic is trash. I tried using it for zoom meetings and other people struggle to hear me. I've tried recording what I sounded like and it was a garbled mess that sounds like I'm trying to talk through a towel. Do not recommend this at all.

title: WASTE OF MONEY!!!
text:
Exchanged twice , Never able to connect, horrible Bluetooth, much frustrating experience.
Never ever buy cheap things
We lost out money!

title: GREAT value
text: Bought as a gift and he loves them. Sound quality is excellent.

title: Good quality
text: Bought for my son, he likes them and you can't hear them when on ear so not overly loud. Seem sturdy so far and no issues after a few weeks.

title: comfy
text: these are super comfy and the sound is great!

title: Works as intended
text: Sturdy, charges fast, and sound quality is good. Got these for 5 y/o nephew who plays educational videos on ipad. Work well and haven't broken.

title: Not good... great!
text: Great headphones. Love the sound quality. Downside is I use my headphones to listen podcast when I go to sleep. Finding the right quiet setting is bit of a fuss and the let light lights up my room every time it blinks making it hard to go to sleep. I ended up covering the light with tape. Other then that I live these headphones.

title: Ok
text: You get what you pay for. Headphones do their job as far as being bluetooth and having sound come out, but they're not durable. Also, sound quality is just ok.

title: Exactly as describe.
text: Everything works great and they perfect

title: Good for the Price
text: These are good, I use them at the gym.  Long charging life.

title: Decent
text: Good comfy fit. Sleek look. Sound not great

title: Alright for the price but I've had better pair for the same price
text:
I really like these headphones because they are lightweight and comfortable. I dislike that the location of the buttons and don't like that there isn't a skip button for songs. Can only pause/play, control volume, and media output (Bluetooth/radio). I find myself never using the buttons because they are situated behind the right ear.
I do like the on off isna switch and not a button so you know it's on or off. The sound quality is clear but I think could be louder. I listen with full volume on both the headphones and my phone

Overall I love the color and lightness and that I can walk some distance from my phone in the gym and the music still plays, but sound and buttons aren't my dislikes
I ordered the purple and white

title: Works perfectly!
text: This headphones works great, and I love how comfy it is on your ears. My son is using for distance learning. The sound is good, it's not Beats quality but its perfect if you just need it for daily regular use. The mic works well as well.

title: Super comfortable.
text:
I have small ears and lots of piercings and these are super comfortable.
Noise canceling is non existent, but as a parent I like that I can listen to whatever in great quality and still keep one ear open as it were

title: Bluetooth stopped functioning after 3 months
text:
The noise cancelation was non existent.
Quality and controls are extremely low quality. Bluetooth stopped working 3mos in.
Very disappointed.

title: So excited
text: Finally got a great pair again awesome sound quality and volume I'm in love with them again

title: Great quality headphones
text: I bought these for my partner, and he absolutely loves them! He tells me on multiple occassions how much he loves them. He loves the bluetooth capabilities, and the sd card option. I read the reviews before buying them, and I don't regret purchasing them.

title: Good sound and quality
text: Bought these for my granddaughter for 6th grade graduation gift in 2020. She loves it 😍. Very durable.

title: Great headphones!
text: These headphones are really great in the office, I can't hear my co workers unless they are close or yelling

title: Perfect for Online School
text: My son loves them! He uses them for online school and listening to music. There was even an issue with them and the company was responsive and gave great customer service ice to remedy the issue.

title: Waste of money
text: These headphones cut out for the first 5-10 seconds of every song, chapter, podcast, show…. etc. I got a replacement, twice and they still do it! Don’t bother, spend the extra money and get ones that don’t suck!

title: Sounds good.
text: At first they kept sending notifications and turned down volume several times at gym. Was going to return but, after 4th time using them it went away and there pretty good.

title: Great headset
text: For these to be under 30 bucks it's a great headset. Sound is wonderful. You can feel the bass. And the case it came with is not cheap at all. They feel sturdy, not like some headsets I've had in the past that feel like they are gonna break if you look at them the wrong way.

title: It's okay
text: Got em for 9 year old for online schooling.. he loves em! It has right and left marking on the ear pieces. Doesnt cancel out noise as good. The sound is good but just not 5 star.

title: Great product at a great price.
text: Great product at a great price.

title: Won't Take a Charge
text: I had only owned these for a month when they stopped taking a charge. The battery life got shorter and shorter and now they don't power up at all. I tried multiple different cords to see if that was the issue and nothing worked. They are useless as wireless headphones now which is extremely disappointing.

title: Awesome!
text: Voice call quality is great. Switch power button is great to makes sure it doesnt come on when I dont want it to. Battery life lasts long between charging. Sound is awesome. Very pretty and light. The case for it seems like it may rip at the seems but has held up this far. My 12 year old uses these all the time and it has held up. When it did snap Power Direct replaced them right away.

title: Great headphones
text: Great headphones our son loves it

title: Headphones
text:
My friend coworker suggested I purchase these, best investment ever good price.

Not recommended for bass type of music.

title: Not bad for the price
text: I used these for the first time today and was surprised how comfortable they were. The sound quality is good but volume is limited.  I was disappointed to find that the left speaker withing the ear case is loose and giggles around..

title: Cute headphones
text: I liked that these can be used via Wi-Fi or wired. They were very easy to pair. These are fantastic quality headphones, especially for that price.

title: Sounds like you are under water
text:
Pros: compact perfect for nursing school, comfortable, and long battery life
Cons: sound quality is terrible. Sounds like you are under water which makes listening to music, lectures, or TV shows/movies terrible.

title: This is great!!!
text: This works awesome and I can even hook it up to my computer.

title: If you wear glasses it fits perfect around your ears!
text: I like how they are light weight but very sturdy. They are compact. The instructions are easy to understand with pictures.

title: Great product so far! Great price
text: I purchased these for my son to use for online learning as we have a baby who can be a great distraction!  These came quickly and easy to use. I charged them for about 2 hours and then paired them with my cell to test them out. They worked flawlessly. I really like the case, it is the perfect size and contains a storage pocket for the charging cable and 3mm connection. The designer even reached out to provide a pdf manual (which we have needed) which was thoughtful.  The design of the headphones are cool and the color pops we purchased the black and yellow. So far so great. I highly recommend.
